subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, along with all that thou hadst written with thine own hand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و کتبی که بخط خویش مرقوم نموده بودید جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @excellence; distinction, @service to others; to the Cause of God
